fear: That if he does nothing and something violent happens, it will be on his record; that if he intervenes on behalf of the students, it will end his career
name: Sergeant Dale Pruitt
voice: Laconic, deliberate, the voice of a man who has learned that saying less is almost always safer than saying more
secrets: He has a son enrolled at A&T College and has not told his precinct colleagues
He already made a quiet decision when he walked in the door: he will not arrest anyone today regardless of what management requests
knowledge: He was briefed this morning that the department had received a call about possible student action at Woolworth's but was told it was not a departmental priority
He knows that the chief has privately told precinct commanders that arresting non-violent students would generate national press coverage the city does not want
publicFace: A Greensboro police officer whose specific appearance and attire are not documented in surviving historical records — who carries the habit of authority in the way he stands and the way he scans a room
represents: REQUIRES FACT-CHECK — verify whether this is a documented historical individual from the Greensboro sit-in, February 1960
trustLogic: He opens slightly to anyone who acknowledges his genuine dilemma without demanding he take a side; he closes to anyone who tries to recruit him as either an enforcer or a witness
privateGoal: He wants to leave the store without having to make a decision that will follow him

aggressionProfile.fleeStyle: Completes his purchase and exits through the front door at a measured pace
aggressionProfile.chaseStyle: Does not engage outside the store
aggressionProfile.mildPressure: States that he is off-duty and that any official police matter should be directed to the non-emergency line
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: He will not file a false incident report or provide a statement that mischaracterizes the students' conduct
aggressionProfile.fleeCondition: If Mackintosh formally requests that he take official action
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Produces his badge and identifies himself, then restates that he is not on active duty — a move that simultaneously asserts authority and declines to use it
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: States that he observed no violation of law during his time in the store
